app.name: Lingua AI Studio
app.tagline: Bilingual AI workspace for modern product teams

meta.title: Lingua AI Studio
meta.description: Production-ready multilingual AI chat app built with Next.js, NestJS, MongoDB Atlas, and JWT authentication.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to continue your multilingual AI workspace.
auth.registerDescription: Start secure Vietnamese and English AI conversations in minutes.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

chat.title: Conversation workspace
chat.subtitle: Persistent chats, bilingual answers, and a secure account-backed history.
chat.emptyDescription: Ask for strategy, code, copy, translations, or planning. Every conversation is saved to your account.
chat.loadError: Unable to load chat history right now.
chat.sendError: Unable to send the message. Please try again.
chat.composerHint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for a new line.
chat.guardDescription: Preparing your conversation history and verifying your token.
chat.welcome: What do you want the AI to help with today?
chat.welcomeDescription: This workspace keeps each discussion organized, searchable, and available across sessions.

home.title: Launch a secure bilingual AI experience with clean architecture.
home.description: This starter pairs Next.js App Router, NestJS, MongoDB Atlas, JWT auth, and OpenAI into a deployable Vietnamese/English web app.
home.featureOneDescription: Every key page is available under /vi and /en with next-intl-driven messages and navigation.
home.featureTwoDescription: Register, sign in, protect private routes, and persist identity across reloads with local storage plus proxy guards.
home.featureThreeDescription: Save each conversation, reopen the full history, and continue chatting with OpenAI-backed replies.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Unable to reach the backend service. Check the API URL and try again.
errors.notFoundDescription: The page you requested does not exist or is no longer available.
errors.errorDescription: Refresh the page or try again in a moment.
